positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustration of a mystical forest floor at midnight. The scene features glowing, bioluminescent flora, intricate stylized ferns, and delicate, ethereal floating orbs, creating a sense of profound depth. The composition is perfectly centralized and symmetric, emphasizing clean silhouettes suitable for apparel prints. Utilize a dramatic color palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, and rich emerald green, dramatically contrasted by neon cyan and lime green glowing highlights. The artistic style should blend refined, sharp graphic etching with modern vector art aesthetics, ensuring crisp lines, strong contrasts, and absolute clarity. Highly detailed, photorealistic definition of non-photorealistic subject matter.
negative: blurry, low resolution, poorly drawn, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, text, signature, logo, artifact, jpeg artifacts, grainy, muted colors, messy
